zh.Saint Peter's Church, Dyrham, South Glou: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Childrey於大約1360年出生在英國波克夏爾德時，她的父親Sir Edmund Childrey36歲，母親Lucy Frethorne34歲。她於大約1379年6月與Sir Maurice Russell在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1399年在英國格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Childrey于大约1360年出生在英国波克夏爾德时，她的父亲Sir Edmund Childrey36岁，母亲Lucy Frethorne34岁。她于大约1379年6月与Sir Maurice Russell在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1399年在英国格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Childrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Childrey in Oxfordshire, which is named for Childrey Brook. This is probably ‘stream (Old English rīth) of Cilla (masculine) or Cille (feminine)’, but the first element could alternatively be Old English cille ‘spring’. The surname has died out in England.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Childrey was born about 1360, in Childrey, Berkshire, England, her father, Sir Edmund Childrey, was 36 and her mother, Lucy Frethorne, was 34. She married Sir Maurice Russell about June 1379, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1399, in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 40, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Childrey est née environ 1360, à Childrey, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Childrey, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Lucy Frethorne, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Maurice Russell environ juin 1379, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1399, à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint Peter's Church, Dyrham, South Glou: St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Childrey um 1360 in Childrey, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edmund Childrey 36 und ihre Mutter Lucy Frethorne 34. Sie hat um Juni 1379 in England Sir Maurice Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1399 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Childrey è nata il circa 1360 nel Childrey, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Edmund Childrey, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Lucy Frethorne, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Maurice Russell circa giugno 1379, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1399, nel Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Childreyが約1360年にイギリスバークシュアイアチルドリーで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Childreyは36歳，母Lucy Frethorneは34歳であった。約1379年6月にイギリスでSir Maurice Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1399年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムスト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Peter's Church, Dyrham, South Glou: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디람 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Childrey(이)가 대략 1360년 영국 버크실르 치드리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edmund Childrey(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucy Frethorne(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1379년 6월 영국에서 Sir Maurice Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 그루스스터실르 디람에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디람 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Childrey nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Childrey, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Frethorne, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Maurice Russell aproximadamente junho de 1379, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1399, em Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em St Peter's Church, Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Peter's Church, Dyrham, South Glou: ст питир'с чурч, дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Childrey родилась около 1360 г. в местности чаилдри, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Edmund Childrey было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Frethorne, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Maurice Russell около июнь 1379 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1399 г. в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
